# Pheng Mobile (ເພັງ ໂມບາຍ)

> Mobile phone shop and repair service in Laos — online store for phones, accessories, and parts, plus a repair tracking portal for customers.

## Pages

- [Shop](/shop): Browse phones, accessories, and parts with online ordering, pickup, or delivery.
- [Sign in](/login): Staff sign-in for the POS and management dashboard.
